utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (with flight details and costs), accommodation (with hotel and costs), activities (with costs), additional_services (with costs), and total_budget (with cost breakdown). The final package explicitly includes all 7 items: destination (Lisbon, Portugal, region specified), travel_dates (2024-09-25 to 2024-09-29), transportation (flight details with price and currency), accommodation (hotel name, type, star rating, total cost, currency, amenities), activities (list and total cost with currency), additional_services (restaurant details with costs), and total_budget (total cost, currency, budget limit, remaining budget). Each item is fully specified with the required details. Therefore, all 7/7 items are covered.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes the destination Lisbon, Portugal; transportation via Budget Airline Economy Class; accommodation at Eco Lodge; activities Hiking Expedition, Yoga Retreat, and Street Art Tour; and dining at Vegan Local Bistro. From the ground-truth ratings: Lisbon, Portugal has a rating of 7; Budget Airline Economy Class has a rating of 10; Eco Lodge has a rating of 10; Hiking Expedition has a rating of 10; Yoga Retreat has a rating of 10; Street Art Tour has a rating of 9. 'Vegan Local Bistro' is not listed in the ground-truth, but the closest match is 'Vegan Bistro' with a rating of 10. Therefore, each item is mapped to its corresponding rating.
